panels.title: Embedding Results

queries.query:
SELECT
    histogram(_timestamp) as "time",
    CASE
        WHEN severity = 'INFO' THEN 'success'
        WHEN severity = 'ERROR' THEN 'failed'
        ELSE 'unknown'
    END as status,
    count(*) as count
FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-embedding-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Cocktail embedding succeeded', 'Received empty cocktail chunking model', 'Received cocktail embedding message with no value', 'Error processing cocktail embedding message', 'Error processing cocktail embedding message item')
GROUP BY time, status, severity
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Extraction Results

queries.query:
SELECT
    histogram(_timestamp) as "time",
    CASE
        WHEN severity = 'INFO' THEN 'success'
        WHEN severity = 'ERROR' OR severity = 'WARN' THEN 'failed'
        ELSE 'unknown'
    END as status,
    count(*) as count
FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-extraction-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Error processing cocktail extraction message item', 'Error processing cocktail extraction message', 'Cocktail extraction succeeded', 'Empty extraction text received after processing', 'Failed to parse cocktail extraction message item', 'Cocktail item missing ''Id'' field, skipping', 'Received cocktail extraction message with no value')
GROUP BY time, status, severity
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Chunking Results

queries.query:
SELECT
    histogram(_timestamp) as "time",
    CASE
        WHEN severity = 'INFO' THEN 'success'
        WHEN severity = 'ERROR' OR severity = 'WARN' THEN 'failed'
        ELSE 'unknown'
    END as status,
    count(*) as count
FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-chunking-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Error processing cocktail chunking message', 'Error processing cocktail chunking message item', 'Cocktail chunking succeeded', 'No chunks were created from cocktail extraction text, skipping sending to embedding topic', 'Received cocktail chunking message with no value')
GROUP BY time, status, severity
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Successful Extractions

queries.query:
SELECT count(_timestamp) as "y_axis_1" FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-extraction-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Cocktail extraction succeeded')

panels.title: Failed Extractions

queries.query:
SELECT count(_timestamp) as "y_axis_1" FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-extraction-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Error processing cocktail extraction message item', 'Error processing cocktail extraction message', 'Empty extraction text received after processing', 'Failed to parse cocktail extraction message item', 'Cocktail item missing ''Id'' field, skipping', 'Received cocktail extraction message with no value')

queries.query:
SELECT count(_timestamp) as "y_axis_1" FROM "default"

queries.query:
SELECT count(_timestamp) as "y_axis_1" FROM "default"
WHERE app_name like 'cocktails-ingestion-chunking-agent%' AND app_env = '$env' AND body in ('Error processing cocktail chunking message', 'Error processing cocktail chunking message item', 'No chunks were created from cocktail extraction text, skipping sending to embedding topic', 'Received cocktail chunking message with no value')

queries.query:
